message:
test(bluebubbles): expand connector unit tests for introspection, manifest, and safety classification

Add 20+ unit tests covering all 8 introspection operations, manifest
TOML validity and security properties (sandbox, deny_exec, localhost
restriction, forbidden capabilities), safety tier classification
(send_message is Risky, read ops are Safe), operations with non-empty
summaries, unique IDs, valid idempotency, declared capabilities,
doctor pre-configure behavior, health pre-configure state, and
deterministic constructor behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
